name: Total Sub
description: Hybrid modulation hub with four CV LFOs, random and sample-and-hold sources, clock division, quantized gate patterns and a hidden rhythmic sequencer.

controls.name: LFO 1 Rate
controls.description: Sets the speed of the first LFO.

controls.name: LFO 1 Range
controls.description: Selects the slow or fast range for LFO 1.

controls.name: LFO 4 Rate
controls.description: Sets the speed of the fourth LFO and the internal gate engine.

controls.name: LFO 4 Wave Select
controls.description: Chooses the active waveform for LFO 4.

controls.name: Random Mode
controls.description: Switches the random wave between stepped and smoothed behavior.

controls.name: Clock Divider
controls.description: Sets the division stage for the gate sequencer and clock outputs.

inputs.name: S&H IN
inputs.description: External source for the sample-and-hold stage instead of noise.

inputs.name: TRIG IN
inputs.description: Trigger input for the sample-and-hold stage.

inputs.name: LFO 1 CV
inputs.description: Voltage control for LFO 1 frequency multiplication.

inputs.name: LFO 4 CV
inputs.description: Voltage control for LFO 4 frequency and gate-pattern behavior.

inputs.name: EXT CLOCK IN
inputs.description: External clock input that can replace the internal clock source automatically.

inputs.name: PHASE CV
inputs.description: Applies phase modulation and gate rarefaction.

inputs.name: DEPTH CV
inputs.description: Sets output depth and gate density.

inputs.name: QNT CV
inputs.description: Quantizes the selected LFO waveform or gate pattern.

outputs.name: LFO 4 OUT
outputs.description: Fourth LFO output and rhythmic gate source.

outputs.name: CLK /2
outputs.description: Clock divider output at half rate.

outputs.name: CLK /4
outputs.description: Clock divider output at quarter rate.

outputs.name: CLK /8
outputs.description: Clock divider output at eighth rate.

outputs.name: CLK /16
outputs.description: Clock divider output at sixteenth rate.

behaviors.name: Four LFOs plus random source
behaviors.description: Total Sub combines four LFOs with S&H and random waveforms, so it can act as the modulation center of a small system.

behaviors.name: Clock-aware modulation
behaviors.description: An external clock can replace the internal clock automatically, and the divider follows along.

behaviors.name: Gate pattern generation
behaviors.trigger: LFO 4 in random mode with QNT CV
behaviors.description: The module can turn its rhythm logic into strategic gate patterns, ratchets and fills rather than plain periodic pulses.

behaviors.name: Hidden sequencer behavior
behaviors.description: The divider and reset logic form a hidden gate sequencer that can produce more musical rhythm variants than a basic clock splitter.

behaviors.name: CV shaping
behaviors.trigger: MULTIPLY, PHASE, DEPTH and QNT CVs
behaviors.description: The extra CV inputs let you reshape waveforms, modulate gate density and quantize motion without leaving the module.

patchIdeas.name: Clocked modulation hub
patchIdeas.patch: Use an external clock to lock the module, then fan out the divider, LFOs and S&H to drums, filters and VCAs.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Total Sub:
Sequencer:
Drum:
Filter:
VCA:
Output:

- Sequencer (Clock) c> Total Sub (EXT CLOCK IN)
- Total Sub (CLK /4) c> Drum (Trig)
- Total Sub (S&H OUT) >> Filter (Cutoff)
- Total Sub (LFO 1 OUT) >> VCA (CV)
- Total Sub (LFO 4 OUT) >> Drum (Accent)
- Filter (Out) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Rhythm generator
patchIdeas.patch: Let the divider outputs drive several drum voices while the random and quantized outputs keep the groove from repeating too predictably.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Total Sub:
Clock Source:
Kick:
Snare:
Hat:
Output:

- Clock Source (Out) c> Total Sub (EXT CLOCK IN)
- Total Sub (CLK /2) c> Kick (Trig)
- Total Sub (CLK /8) c> Snare (Trig)
- Total Sub (LFO 4 OUT) c> Hat (Trig)
- Total Sub (S&H OUT) >> Hat (Pitch)
- Hat (Out) -> Output (In)

patchIdeas.name: Modulated drone control
patchIdeas.patch: Use the LFOs to move a drone voice while the sample-and-hold output nudges the filter and VCA in irregular steps.
patchIdeas.diagram:
Total Sub:
VCO:
Filter:
VCA:
Output:

- VCO (Out) -> Filter (In)
- Total Sub (LFO 2 OUT) >> Filter (Cutoff)
- Total Sub (S&H OUT) >> VCO (FM)
- Total Sub (LFO 3 OUT) >> VCA (CV)
- Filter (Out) -> VCA (In)
- VCA (Out) -> Output (In)
